title: Teacher found guilty of rape in Plett
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Plettenberg Bay...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Plettenberg Bay Regional Court has found Murray High School teacher Thabile Manetsa guilty of rape.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The Plettenberg Bay Regional Court has found Murray High School teacher Thabile Manetsa guilty of rape."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Thabile Manetsa (29), who was granted bail after his arrest, pleaded not guilty to the charge of raping his then girlfriend's friend on 2 September 2023."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On 17 October this year, Magistrate Siyabonga Mazibuko found him guilty of rape.","html":"On 17 October this year, Magistrate Siyabonga Mazibuko found him guilty of rape."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the request of the defence, the hearing has been postponed for sentencing to 2 December for pre-sentence reports to be tabled.","html":"At the request of the defence, the hearing has been postponed for sentencing to 2 December for pre-sentence reports to be tabled."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Manetsa was charged with one count of rape that occurred on 2 September 2023.","html":"Manetsa was charged with one count of rape that occurred on 2 September 2023."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On this day, the victim and her friend (who was Manetsa's girlfriend at the time) went for dinner, whereafter they decided to go a club. After that they returned to the victim's apartment.","html":"On this day, the victim and her friend (who was Manetsa's girlfriend at the time) went for dinner, whereafter they decided to go a club. After that they returned to the victim's apartment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fright","html":"Fright"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An argument broke out between the victim's friend and her flatmate. The friend then called her boyfriend to fetch her.","html":"An argument broke out between the victim's friend and her flatmate. The friend then called her boyfriend to fetch her."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The two friends had plans to attend an event in Plett the next morning, and they decided to travel to Plett with Manetsa together, and went to his house.","html":"The two friends had plans to attend an event in Plett the next morning, and they decided to travel to Plett with Manetsa together, and went to his house."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to evidence, Manetsa and his girlfriend slept in the bed and the victim on the couch.","html":"According to evidence, Manetsa and his girlfriend slept in the bed and the victim on the couch."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The victim woke up to Manetsa having sex with her. She got a fright and asked him what he was doing. He apologised."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She was emotional and not sure how to react. She then informed her friends and family of what happened and they encouraged her to open a case against him.","html":"She was emotional and not sure how to react. She then informed her friends and family of what happened and they encouraged her to open a case against him."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Improbable","html":"Improbable"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The complainant was reluctant at first for fear that it would be his word against hers. She eventually agreed to laying criminal charges and a case was later opened with the police.","html":"The complainant was reluctant at first for fear that it would be his word against hers. She eventually agreed to laying criminal charges and a case was later opened with the police."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Manetsa denied the allegations levelled against him by the state and testified that he and the complainant had had consensual oral sex."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After scrutinising all of the evidence, Magistrate Mazibuko found the evidence of all state witnesses to be credible and that Manetsa's version was \"improbable\".","html":"After scrutinising all of the evidence, Magistrate Mazibuko found the evidence of all state witnesses to be credible and that Manetsa's version was \"improbable\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Teacher guilty of rape"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Teacher found guilty of rape in Plett
